user.title: User Profile
user.description: Stores user profile information and preferences.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth

createdAt.description: When the user account was created

document.title: Generated Document
document.description: Stores metadata and content of generated legal documents.

userId.description: ID of the user who generated the document

type.description: Type of document (e.g., NDA, Freelance Contract)

content.description: Markdown content of the generated document

formData.description: The form data used to generate the document
